place_name: KinderCare Child Specialist Clinic / Klinik Pakar Kanak-kanak
place_address: 6-0, Jalan Putra Mahkota 7/7a, Putra Heights, 47650 Subang Jaya, Selangor
review_text:
This is probably my fifth visit with Dr. Shafaf for my son. Each time my son has a fever, she usually prefers to let his immune system fight it off after carefully checking his condition. However, during our last visit (which is yesterday), she decided to start antibiotics at an early stage. I didn’t quite understand at first and asked her about it — she patiently explained, and although I still couldn’t fully grasp the medical reasoning, I chose to trust her judgment.

On the night after seeing Doctor Shafaf, there was once my son’s fever spiked to 40°C. It really showed me how accurate Dr. Shafaf’s professional observation was — this infection was something his immune system couldn’t handle alone.

As a Chinese family, it’s rare for us to consult a Muslim doctor, not out of prejudice, but simply because we usually look for someone who speaks our language. After few visits, I’ve started to see Dr. Shafaf as my son’s family doctor. She is beautiful, humble, soft-spoken, caring, and speaks fluent English, which makes communication very easy. Her nurses are also friendly and kind. Clinic is on auto sanitation 24 hours. Charges, reasonable. Services, excellent.

I feel very fortunate to have found Dr. Shafaf, and I’m truly impressed by her professionalism and compassion. Thanks Dr Shafaf and team!

review_text:

Relatively new clinic with tip top cleanliness, furnished with books and toys which are relatively new and clean. There’s quick 5 mins in-house blood test to check whether my girl’s illness due to viral or bacteria infection which impressed me a lot. Small clinic but well-equipped. I saw theater room beside consultation room too. Just to take note that parking space in front of clinic is limited, but that’s not an issue, as you can park further a bit at Jalan Putra Mahkota 7/8b. Yay, happy to know good PD nearby, no need to go to USJ and brave through the traffic congestion and all!

On top of that, I appreciate kind gesture of PD to call/message for following up.

Thank you, Dr. Shafaf and the team. Keep up the excellent work.

review_text:
I had a really reassuring and positive experience during my visit to Dr Karthigan Clinic. From the moment I walked in, the environment felt calm, welcoming, and well-organised, which already made a big difference.

Dr Karthigan took the time to truly listen, explain things clearly, and address my concerns with patience and empathy. I never felt rushed or dismissed — instead, I felt genuinely cared for as a person, not just treated as a case. His professionalism, knowledge, and gentle manner immediately built trust.

The staff were equally kind and attentive, making the entire visit smooth and comfortable. It’s rare to find a clinic where you feel both medically confident and emotionally at ease, and this was exactly that kind of experience.

I’m very grateful for the care I received and would highly recommend Dr Karthigan to anyone looking for a doctor who combines expertise with genuine compassion.

review_text:

Eventually went in after they opened, registered and waited for 40mins. Doctor was not there, no updates or apologies from the assistants who were present there.

They called after I left and mentioned doctor has reached, I told I have left.

If you’re visiting this clinic for urgent care, might as well skip it as the time they have provided is not followed and they don’t provide any updates while you’re there.

Definitely some must have had good experiences here, then please drop them a call and confirm the time doctor will reach, based on my experience WALK-IN’s are not recommended at all.

review_text:
I visited Klinik Cyberjaya and was attended to by Dr Karthigan, their resident Doctor.

The entire visit was a very pleasant experience.  The registration was prompt and there was no wait time to see the doctor.

Dr Karthigan was patient and listened attentively as I  explained my symptoms. Subsequently an examination was conducted and a few tests were done to rule out serious central causes.
Dr Karthigan then proceeded to explain his findings and why I was undergoing my symptoms which was very informative.  He prescribed the necessary medication and asked to revisit should my symptoms persist.  He also suggested a few exercises which can be done at home to help with my condition in the event it recurs.

Overall I'm glad I was treated by Dr Karthigan as I felt I was in safe and capable hands.

I will definitely be returning to this clinic in the future.

review_text: I went to Iswanah Health Care for acupuncture because of my shoulder pain, the consultation with doctor was good. She explained about the acupuncture procedure. review_text: The place does not have a professional setting, all physicians dress in a blue disposable gown, the treatment room is not soundproof so when i do my acupuncture i was not relax at all (we should feel relax considering the treatment objective AND the money we paid for this, its not cheap). The consultation with the physician was horrible, who yawns while talking to the patient?? Not friendly at all, and she’s trying too hard to hardsell to take a longer package considering my condition and questioning why wouldn’t i start the treatment earlier. The instructions to change into their clothes were very harsh like ‘ok whatever change your bottom bye’, and didnt even asked if im ready before opening the curtain to start poking me with the needles. Didnt even tell me how many needles i would need for my session. Just my honest review. Take it or leave it. But i advise for those who wants to do acupuncture, dont do it here. :))

review_text: Asaalamualaikum kepada semua pencari kesembuhan. Pertama saya dan isteri sangat kecewa serta sangat tidak berpuas hati terhadap keseluruhan pengalaman saya hadir di pusat ini utk rawatan akupuntur. Sikap yg sangat tidak professional oleh seorang " doktor kot " yg tiada langsung ethic seperti seorang doktor. Sikap sambil lewa dan langsung tidak prihatin terhadap pesakit yang sgt2 memerlukan kesembuhan. Rasa mcm kena scam dgn bayaran RM 30 consultation plus rm 100 utk sesi akupuntur yg sgt mengecewakan. Saya akan ajukan aduan saya ke pihak berwajib, KKM dan Persatuan pengguna utk tindakan lanjut. Saya terpanggil utk melakukan ini atas dasar kemanusiaan, kasihan melihat makcik² terpaksa membayar ratusan ringgit utk rawatan tertentu jika megalami nasib seperti saya. Maaf kepada pengurusan pusat ini dan saya harap ini menjadi iktibar utk lebih bertanggungjawab terhadap perkhidmatan yg anda sediakan. Wallahuaalam bissawap.

review_text:
I had a bad experience even before seeing the doctor,
Tried to make appointment initially and it was answered by unknown admin (no introduction),
started with saying there will be a lot of patient, anyway i am trying to make appointment so things are more manageable for both side.
Anyhow we managed to settled with an "appointment" and when i arrived, the attendee seems surprised by my visit and keep asking how i made appointment and when i made appointment and finally did my insurance agent made appointment for me for this visit.

I managed to proof everything even with the letter and can sense something is not right. After like 10 minutes she said this appointment had to be cancelled cause GE only can be handled by specific doctor and the doctor is currently on MC.
Since i already fast can't they just draw the blood? She said no only specific doctor can draw the blood and a few Q&A will be done during this visit also by a specific doctor.
Finally i said ok, then when can i visit next, she just said tomorrow but no promise since there will be one doc and i might need to wait if there is a lot of patients.
I just agreed and go to another panel clinic and got this done even without seeing the doctor, all they needed is the blood as that is the only requirement by GE from the letter.

Anyway i hope the management can look into the SOP as i can see the receptionist is quite clueless and taking their own action which in the end wasted both side time. This review is mainly to share there is a lot of room for improvement and i hope you all can take it positively also have some courtesy to appologise and even the Doc is on MC, all the appointment should be notified early to avoid any misunderstanding. I did drop a message to the admin cancel the appointment after i got this sort out earlier as a courtesy also.

place_address: NO. 8G & 9G, Klinik Utama 24 Jam Cyberjaya (Nadayu,Tamarind Square), NADAYU SQUARE, NADAYU 99, Cyber 9, 63000 Cyberjaya, Selangor
review_text:
19/08/2025 around 0200HRS

My girlfriend and I visited this clinic recently as she was experiencing severe pain. Unfortunately, the experience we had was very disappointing due to the conduct of the staff and the lack of professionalism displayed.

Upon arrival, we had to press the doorbell twice before anyone responded. Initially, we assumed the delay was due to the late shift and perhaps staff resting. However, we were surprised to see that the receptionist and staff were actually engaged in casual conversation and deliberately keeping their heads below the counter to avoid acknowledging us. This behavior reflects extremely poor customer service and disregard for patients in distress.

Secondly, the consultation with the doctor was unsatisfactory. Rather than conducting a proper and thorough examination, the doctor immediately administered an injection based solely on our verbal explanation and assumed it was a simple upset stomach. A medical professional is expected to assess the patient carefully, rule out other possibilities, and provide a proper diagnosis before proceeding with treatment. This lack of diligence and attention is concerning and unacceptable.

While the clinic’s environment itself is comfortable, the quality of service provided by both the front desk staff and the attending doctor fell far below basic expectations of professionalism and patient care. We hope the management will take this feedback seriously and implement improvements to ensure future patients are treated with the respect, attention, and medical care they deserve

review_text:
I have no issues with this clinic — I come here often. The male doctor is always kind and friendly. However, on 12th May 2025, I was treated by a female doctor, and I’m not sure what was wrong, but she asked about my condition in a very rushed manner and not friendly at all.

I came for treatment because I was experiencing fever, cough, and a sore throat. She did not check my temperature. She only checked my blood pressure and lungs. She seemed to be in a hurry and quickly said she would prescribe three types of medicine, then asked me which ones I wanted or didn’t want. She also asked if I had anything else to say.

As a doctor, she should not treat patients in such a way, especially when we are paying for medical care. Patients deserve proper attention and a thorough check-up, not to be rushed through without a clear reason. Perhaps she wasn’t happy about having to work on a public holiday — but even so, professionalism and care should still come first.

Dr Nurul Iman,

Just a piece of advice from me. Being a doctor requires a lot of patience. You see people who are concern about their health every single day. We do not have the expertise in this field, hence why we go and see you. Saying things like “Then you nak I buat apa sekarang ni?” after I told you that I wanna postpone doing a blood test based on your guidance for me, like you were angry that I didn’t wanna do it is so unprofessional and unethical as a doctor, someone who’s supposed to educate and care for us. I asked for an MC because I am genuinely sick, I woke up at 6 am with my body hot. You sighed and said “Satu hari je” in an annoyed manner. I’ve been coming to Klinik Utama for a while now, but starting today, I will never step foot in there again because of your unprofessional issues dealing with patients. You’re gonna keep losing patients if you keep a doctor like this at your clinic.

review_text:
Just came back from this clinic after seeing a doctor for a prolonged cough and possible wheezing. Instead of providing a thorough assessment and proper medical advice, the doctor asked me to decide whether I wanted antibiotics, saying that either option—taking them or not—was fine. When I asked why antibiotics were necessary, as my phlegm was clear and didn’t seem to indicate an infection, the doctor responded in an unfriendly tone, dismissing my concern and saying it had nothing to do with the phlegm, which contradicting what a previous doctor had told me.
On top of that, I was also left to decide when to take my medications, as the doctor mentioned that the medications provided would treat my symptoms separately and could affect one another.

I went to the clinic to seek proper medical advice, but instead, I was expected to make my own medical decisions without sufficient guidance. I expected a more professional and informative consultation, but unfortunately, that wasn’t the case.

I felt belittled like im a new parent who is blowing things out of proportion. This is my youngest of 4 children and i think i know when i see something that is worth concerning. At last i went to see a specialist and ya, her infection was already infecting her cornea and specialist also geleng kepala coz i told her the GP at klinik utama said “this is normal, mummy pls calm down”
Please dont belittle ur patients even if u think u are in the right. A doc needs to know how to reassure and listen to patient’s concerns. I didnt get the name of the female malay doctor that attended my daughter, but it was a first bad experience for us. I hope it was a one time thing only as the front desk staff n the ambience of this clinic was very nice.

review_text:
Disappointing experience . My child was having an allergic reaction, but the clinic did not seem to take it seriously. The doctor spent less than a minute examining my child and the consultation felt very rushed and dismissive.

Went to Qualitas Clinic for 2nd opinion, and the difference was very noticeable. The doctor there immediately informed that my child’s condition was already quite severe, prescribed the necessary medication, and clearly explained what symptoms to monitor. We were also advised to go straight to emergency if things worsened.

A proper examination and clear explanation make a huge difference, especially when it involves a child’s health. Very disappointed with the level of care and attentiveness at this clinic. Doc here only prescribed medicine and advise to change bedsheet…

place_address: NO. 8G & 9G, Klinik Utama 24 Jam Cyberjaya (Nadayu,Tamarind Square), NADAYU SQUARE, NADAYU 99, Cyber 9, 63000 Cyberjaya, Selangor
review_text:
I’m writing to share my experience with this clinic, particularly regarding a recent consultation.

Yesterday, my husband visited the clinic due to persistent vomiting and weakness. He was attended by a doctor who explained that his gastric condition had worsened and proceeded with IV drip treatment. The consultation was clear and helpful.

However, today we returned as his condition had not improved. He was still weak, continued vomiting, and had developed diarrhea. We came back to the same clinic expecting continuity of care, especially since his records from the previous visit were already available.

Unfortunately, our experience with Dr. Siti Sarah was disappointing. The consultation felt rushed and lacked empathy. Upon entering the room, she immediately asked if he was still vomiting, without referring to his previous visit. When my husband explained that he had already been treated the day before and that his symptoms had worsened with diarrhea, the response given was simply that it might be food poisoning, followed by a brief question about what he had eaten.

When he mentioned chicken soup, the advice given was only to avoid spicy food. There was no further explanation, guidance, or suggestions on how to manage his current condition. Especially considering he was weak and unable to keep food down. We were hoping for more comprehensive advice, such as suitable foods, hydration options, or supplements to help restore his energy.

The consultation lasted barely a minute and did not provide the reassurance or support we expected. Additionally, the tone and demeanor felt unfriendly and dismissive. When I tried to speak, I felt unwelcome, and when we requested a MC for the following day, the question about his job was asked in a manner that came across as unnecessarily rude.

We visited the clinic seeking professional medical guidance on what steps to take next, but left feeling unheard and dissatisfied. As paying patients, we expect a certain level of care, attention, and professionalism.

I hope this feedback is taken constructively. Patients come not only for treatment, but also for reassurance and clear guidance. A more attentive and empathetic approach would make a significant difference.

review_text:
We’ve been regular customers of this clinic for a long time and have always been satisfied with the service, which is why we keep coming back.

However, our recent visit with the new doctor, Dr. Siti Sarah was disappointing. My husband went in with a cough and a strained voice, but during the consultation, when he mentioned he was slightly better than the day before but still unwell, the doctor questioned why he would need an MC if he was improving. The tone of the response made him feel uncomfortable and as though his concerns were not being taken seriously.

He was eventually given only pain killer. We hope the clinic can continue to maintain the level of care and professionalism that we appreciated in the past, and that communication with patients can be handled more respectfully. Thanks

review_text:
First time datang, saya sangat suka dengan environment klinik ni. Staff sokongan okay tiada masalah dan first treatment untuk anak saya adalah Dr. lelaki tapi lupa nama dia. Dia professional dan baik. Saya rasa secure je bila dengar Dr. punya explanation.

TAPI

Kali kedua, isteri saya selaku pelanggan yang datang membawa anak untuk meminta rawatan susulan hadir ke KLINIK UTAMA 24 JAM NADAYU CYBERJAYA konsultansi dengan Dr. Siti Sarah. Isteri saya telah memaklumkan kepada saya bahawa Dr. tersebut menggunakan nada intonasi dan gaya bahasa yang kurang sesuai apabila menguruskan seseorang pesakit. Seperti endah tak endah.

Sangat mendukacitakan bila dibandingkan Dr. lain yang memberikan rawatan dan konsultansi yang lebih berbudi bahasa dan juga berlemah lembut. Tujuan saya menulis email ini adalah dengan hasrat agar pihak pengurusan klinik dapat memberi teguran serta latihan yang lebih baik agar sikat biadap Dr. tersebut boleh diubah dengan cara yang lebih professional.

Kepada Pengarah Klinik, klinik awak ada reputasi yang baik, saya rasa kalau tak diambil serius isu dan aduan ini, pelanggan akan mula beralih mendapatkan perkhidmatan di klinik lain dan ini tidak baik untuk imej korporat.

Saya harap dapat diberikan penambahbaikan.

Terima Kasih

review_text:
Ni bukan 1st time datang klinik ni tapi hari rasa macam takpatut ye. Saya refuse ubat yg saya rasa berlebihan dan ubat yg saya dah ada dekat rumah. Lepas refuse, Doktor cakap nak jumpa semula rupanya jumpa and question sy dekat depan counter. Siap cakap doktor ada kpi la dan siap mention sy nak mc kan dekat counter tu. Sy cakap sy takperlukan probiotic sbb saya dah ada dekat rumah dan ada juga ubat yg sy tak perlu sbb dekat rumah dah ada ubat tu. more ubat means lebih banyak yg perlu sy bayar. Kenapa sy perlu beli lagi ubat yg saya mmg dah ada dekat rumah? Siap mengeluh dan tunjuk isyarat “stop” dan cakap ok takpe takpe dekat sy depan counter tu. doktor berulang ulang kali mengeluh. Sangat tak baik perilaku macam tu.
masa dekat dalam bilik doktor, doktor hanya cakap sy perlukan ubat angin sahaja. Tapi bila dekat counter sampai 3 ubat. Sangat takpatut untuk doktor mengeluh.

place_address: NO. 8G & 9G, Klinik Utama 24 Jam Cyberjaya (Nadayu,Tamarind Square), NADAYU SQUARE, NADAYU 99, Cyber 9, 63000 Cyberjaya, Selangor
review_text: Visit klinik semalam sebab rasa sakit dekat area bawah pusat and macam nak demam (tak demam lagi and memang dah bagitahu doctor rasa nak demam je tapi tak demam). Doctor incharge during that time was Dr.Aimy. Staff depan semua bagus, friendly. Tapi sampai ke part Dr ni saya rasa turned off. When i explained to her apa yang sy rasa sakit, dia punya layanan  unfriendly. siap tanya "pain score 1-10, 1 tak sakit, 5 so-so, 10 sakit sampai rasa nak mati". Sy nak tanya lah, kita semua yang hidup ni pernah ke rasa "mati" tu ye? ada je perkataan lain boleh guna kan? ke Dr rasa sy saja datang nk mc? lepas sy buat urine test semua and turns out i have UTI, baru lah cakap elok-elok. So, baru rasa sy serious sakit ke? lepastu sy ada minta mc tak? takde kan? so maksudnya sy dtg mmg sy sakit lah. Klinik Utama Nadayu ni my go-to-clinic to be honest. Dr Asma dan Dr Faiz (Locum rasanya) elok je assess sy dan anak before this. tapi sy mmg kecewa malam tadi. sy tak pernah tulis sepanjang ni review. tapi sy betul-betul kecewa.

review_text:
I’ve been a loyal patient at this clinic for the past three years and have always appreciated the service and staff. However, my recent experiences with Dr. Norshahira have been disappointing and frustrating.

As someone with a sensitive stomach, I do visit the clinic more frequently, and I appreciate that the doctors can see my health records. However, I felt judged when Dr. Norshahira implied that my visits were more about obtaining sick leave than addressing genuine health concerns. It’s disheartening to feel accused when I’ve always approached the clinic for legitimate reasons, especially since my visits are covered by my company’s panel.

The issue escalated when my pregnant wife, who is also breastfeeding a toddler, sought care and a sick leave. Instead of understanding her situation, Dr. Norshahira was dismissive and judgmental, even saying to her, "This is a warning from me, last sick leave." Such comments were unnecessary and hurtful, particularly to a pregnant woman who is already emotionally and physically vulnerable.

As regular patients who have supported this clinic, we expected better care and understanding. This experience has left us disappointed, and sadly, we’ve decided to seek care elsewhere. I hope the clinic will address this and ensure all patients are treated with the empathy and respect they deserve.

review_text:
Had bad experience with both tonight/this morning, receptionists & doctor

I was fine with unfriendly service given by their receptionists because they could be not having proper training for customer service. But, the communication skills by the Indian lady doctor who was on duty was totally unacceptable.

1. Instead of her initiating the inquiries, I have to explain about my visit. She was simply silent and staring at me.

2. Without acknowledging my issues, out of nowhere she shows me an oxymeter and expects me to put my finger with her facial expression of “you should know what to do”.

3. Why must her ask me a question of “on top of medications, do you need anything else?” WHAT DOES IT MEAN? May I guess that this question is related to MC? If yes, why can’t her ask the question directly “Do you need MC today?” If no, what else that she should offer for my situation? Why I have to initiate the request about what I do need? Dear doctor, if I know what to do, I don’t have to visit the clinic at 3am.

She could be tired or sleepy. In the future, I suggest her explain what kind of check up that she is going to do so both patient and her can be on the same page. In example, “let’s check your oxygen, blood pressure and bla, bla, bla. You can put your finger here.” As a patient, I deserve to get an explanation of the services.

This is not my first time having bad service from the same clinic especially from the receptionists. But tonight was worst. Nevertheless, thank you for the unfriendly and unprofessional service from both. I hope that I will  not visit the clinic again in the future. If you cant be friendly at least, be professional.

I didn't take this shot before."

Foreigners please don't come to this clinic. I have seen foreign patients coming in and the staff are not only unable to converse with them in English, but gossip and complain about them behind their back! They don't even try to help the foreign patients at all or try to ease their confusion! They just do whatever and they move along without caring whether the patients understand or not!

Until this day, I have never went back and whenever someone asks me about this clinic, I will always recommend them somewhere else because I know they will be mistreated here.

Please retrain your staff. You are all healthcare providers. Empathy and simple human compassion is the LEAST you must have when providing healthcare to people who are already at their most vulnerable moments.

place_name: Qualitas SV Care Clinic Cyberjaya 24 Hours
place_address: No 2-G, Nadayu Square, Persiaran Bestari, 63000 Cyberjaya, Selangor
review_text:
My name is Benjamin Uzoamaka Mary, I'm a twenty years old Nigerian student.
I came to Malaysia on the 23rd of February 2024 to study nursing at the University of Cyberjaya. During my registration process, I was asked by the school to go to Qualitas SV Clinic Cyberjaya for my medicals.
I was 35weeks pregnant when I came to the clinic for my EMGS medicals. During the medical examination, the doctor found out I had Preeclampsia (high blood pressure (hypertension) disorder that can occur during pregnancy). She quickly called the ambulance while the nurses were administering first aid to me.
I was rushed to Cyberjaya Hospital by ambulance. After being examined by the doctor at the hospital, I had to undergo emergency caesarean section to remove the baby because both I and my baby's life was at risk due to my health Condition.
My EMGS medical result came out during my recovery period at the hospital and it turns out I failed. I called the University immediately I saw the result and I was ask to contact the clinic.
I called the clinic to explain to them my situation but immediately I mentioned my name to the nurse at the other end of the call, she recognizes me as the patient that was taken to the hospital from the clinic by the ambulance. She was so excited to hear from me. After enquiring about me and my baby's welfare, she explained to me that the reason I failed the EMGS medical test was because my blood pressure was very high and she asked me to come to the clinic when I get discharged from the hospital that they're going to help me out.
I went back to the clinic after I was discharged from the hospital as instructed. When I arrived at the clinic, they were all excited to see me, they treat me more like a friend than a patient. They were nice, caring and very compassionate with me.
They assisted me every step of the way on how to rectify my EMGS medical result and thanks to their help, I was able to sort out everything. They are the best.😊

review_text:
Brought my son for covid vaccination here, booked via my sejahtera app. Everything went well for the first dose and was given a date for 2nd booster, on 13th August 2023. Staff say to walk in on the date for vaccination
However nearing the date, i notice that i cant make appt on my sejahtera hence i called the clinic to ask about it.
Much to my disappointment, was told that they do not have any more vaccine for the 2nd dose, and was ask to go to kk/ gov facilities. Reason given they do not know when kkm is getting in more vaccine for the clinic.

Questions
1/ i understand that there might be shortfall from kkm side regarding vaccine supply etc, however i think it is kinda irresponsible to just give the first dose of vaccine and give a date for second dose, but there's actually no vaccine available then, and not even a simple courtesy to inform patient before hand

2/ when ask regarding when will be the vaccine available, there's no definete date, and my concern is how is this going to affect the vaccination schedule since first dose had been administered.
Staff answered confidently that is actually ok for the 2nd dose to be given later than the scheduled date.
Then why are we having a recommended interval by kkm then.

You can truly tell this is a doctor who cares about their patients, especially children. We are very grateful for the professionalism and dedication shown.

Highly recommended for parents looking for a reliable and careful doctor.

place_address: 14-G BLOCK C, NEO CYBER, Lingkaran Cyber Point Barat, Cyber 12, 63000 Cyberjaya, Selangor
review_text:
I had a fantastic experience here for a Medical Check-Up (Blood Test). The clinic environment was clean and comfortable, which made the whole process much better. Dr. Fariz was extremely professional and friendly, and immediately put me at ease. The service was efficient, I received my results on the same day.

I opted for the follow-up consultation, and Dr. Fariz was incredibly thorough. He took the time to explain every detail of the blood test one-by-one. He gave excellent, detailed suggestions on areas I could improve, recommending necessary medication or supplements.

Overall, I am very satisfied. His focus on long-term health and detailed explanations were top-notch. I will definitely be back in six months for a follow-up test as he suggest. 👍🏻

Recently, in my last 2-3 visits, the cost has increased to RM 80-90.

When I asked the dispensary staff to remove a few medicines I already had at home, she said I needed at least 3 medicines to get a medical certificate (mc) 😵‍💫.

Will I return? Yes, because the doctors are nice. However, if I find cheaper options, I might choose those instead.

my visit was on 24 and 25th October 2025 around 1pm. the doctor was unprofessional by dismissing my symptoms when I was having heavy flu (with phlegm). he refused to check further on my condition by saying it is just 1-2 day symptoms, i cannot do any further checking. I clearly said i want phlegm medicine in cough syrup. I was in the consultation room less than 5 minutess.
At dispensary counter, i saw him playing with his phone. When i rejected some of the medicine and i say i prefer cough syrup for phlegm, he was not paying attention when the staff is asking for his advice. I ended up getting cough syrup that is not for phlegm.
This is my go to clinic, but this doctor behaviour is something that cannot be tolerated and i wont visit this clinic again as long as this doctor is working here.

place_address: 14-G BLOCK C, NEO CYBER, Lingkaran Cyber Point Barat, Cyber 12, 63000 Cyberjaya, Selangor
review_text:
We brought our 3 year old to this clinic at 2 a.m. because he was crying in pain complaining belly pain. The doctor barely examined him, immediately said it was constipation even after I mentioned he had already pooped earlier today just few hours earlier. He insisted it was still constipation, advised and gave an enema, and said our son would poop within 5–10 minutes and it would be released, but nothing happened, not even several hours later. Because he wasn’t constipated!
The whole visit felt rushed and careless. The doctor didn’t bother to explore any other possible causes and wasn’t a child friendly doctor for sure - my son was traumatised by the experience. We ended up spending the rest of the night with him still crying in pain.

The next morning, we went to another clinic and it was a complete 180° experience. That doctor was gentle, attentive, and managed to regain the trust our son had lost from this first visit. Truly disappointing experience, never again

review_text: INCONSIDERATE!!!! i went to this branch in Neo cyber due to my SEVERE menstrual pain that i would usually get every month and i HAD NEVER had a doctor tell me its IMPOSSIBLE to dispense 2 days MC for it. i would usually go to the other Klinik utama near tamarind and i had records of me receiving treatment EVEN DRIPS, INJECTION DUE TO MY SEVERE CRAMP and that is how bad my cramp hence the reason why i asked for 2 days MC!!!! The reason why i alternate to neocyber branch was because it was packed and im in pain yet they refused to give 2 days mc and advised me to come back again the next day and to be honest its super troublesome and uncomfortable for me to go back n fourth and it could easily be done with if they had give me 2 days MC. not to mention how long the waiting time is at this branch too. anyways as expected im still having really bad pain today and was unable to attend to my lecturers. i went back to the clinic just for them to charge me again for RM70!!!! RM110 is NOT the price i should be paying for a menstrual cramp. Plus i have always chosen to go to Klinic utama for its affordable price and kindhearted, tiptop hospitality. but not on this specific branch. super frustrating!!

review_text:
Dr Nurul Iman,

Just a piece of advice from me. Being a doctor requires a lot of patience. You see people who are concern about their health every single day. We do not have the expertise in this field, hence why we go and see you. Saying things like “Then you nak I buat apa sekarang ni?” after I told you that I wanna postpone doing a blood test based on your guidance for me, like you were angry that I didn’t wanna do it is so unprofessional and unethical as a doctor, someone who’s supposed to educate and care for us. I asked for an MC because I am genuinely sick, I woke up at 6 am with my body hot. You sighed and said “Satu hari je” in an annoyed manner. I’ve been coming to Klinik Utama for a while now, but starting today, I will never step foot in there again because of your unprofessional issues dealing with patients. You’re gonna keep losing patients if you keep a doctor like this at your clinic.

review_text: Based on google review, expectation was very high for this clinic. It’s okay if you’re unsure regarding patient condition or findings, but please refer for further assessment and treatment. Please be a safe doctor.

place_address: 14-G BLOCK C, NEO CYBER, Lingkaran Cyber Point Barat, Cyber 12, 63000 Cyberjaya, Selangor
review_text:
Klinik paling worst. Dari staff sampai ke dr.
Datang sebab demam. Boleh check kata temp normal. Even memang badan panas tangan dah sejuk. Bp pun tak check. Kata ada batuk and asma tp check belakang 1/2 kali dah kata lung clear sedangkan that time wheezing. Dia boleh kata ok je. Saya kata cuba check lagi sbb saya rasa wheezing. Dia boleh cakap "kkdg awak je rasa macamtu tp taknpun" kau rasa dr polite ke jawab macamtu sumpah rude.  Lepastu dia boleh kata ok je demam baru 2 hari. Habis kau nak demam 1 bulan dulu baru teruk ke? Org dtg klinik nak ubat, nak mc. Kau kene pahm orang bekerja juga. Perlukan mc perlukan dr supporting doc untuk proof kita memang unavle to work. Tp kalaudr macamni payah juga. Check ala kadar. Bagi ubat demam selsema semua ttbe RM120. Tapi tak pelikla sbb claim insurance kan haha biasala tekan macam mana. But tu taknkesahlah.
Dr kalau tahu patient demam checkla temp checkla bp. Tupun kene ajar. Pernah je jumpa dr yang betul berul check. Main main je jadi dr. Ikut mood kau pun tak boleh juga.

Then sampai luar dengar staff dia mengutuk patient. Maybe that time dia nak bagi ubat ke apa ke idk tp maybe ataf tu cakap dia sakit tu sakit ni. Then staff kata " kau tahu x timetu dia kata saya sakit ni juga " pastu dia kata ap? Dia kata kat kawan dia " aku nak je cakap banyak pula sakit kau ni"
Hello? Kau kerja kat klinik. Bukan dekat aesthetic or spa. Memang org dtg nak ubat and sakit. Nak have fun kerja kat wayang . Then takdela org cakap dia sakit. Sumpah bodoh gila staff tu.

Rude nak mampus.
Kau tu cakap kuat. Patientlain semua boleh dengar. Sumpah ni last pergi klinik ni

review_text:
Sangat2...sangat2  teruk. Saya datang untuk hantar suami sbb perut dia kembung dan asyik sendawa..Doctor hnaya Tanya "ya kenapa ??. Husband saya jawab kembung, angin dan sendawa. ( sbb dia mmg lemas dan  skit). Dokter hanya menjawab " makanan dan stress ".
Lepas tuh smpai dekat cashiers terkejut sbb kena bayar rm95. Untuk consult yg sekejap. Tanpa cek tekanan darah, tanpa cek perut, tak Tanya pun benda ape yg dia makan. Lepas tuh kita blik rumah dan minum obat yg dia bgi. Tapi makin teruk pulak jdi nya. Bila call klinik dia ckap dah bgi ubat sesusai yg Dokter bgi.
Kita tunggu smpai tengah hari makin teruk. Last kali kita pergi klinik lain. Untuk cek blik. Pergi klinik lain cek betul2 , cek tekanan darah cek jantung, dan dia ade cancel kan ubat yg klinik ini bgi. Harga pun murah Rm75.

place_address: 14-G BLOCK C, NEO CYBER, Lingkaran Cyber Point Barat, Cyber 12, 63000 Cyberjaya, Selangor
review_text:
Assalamualaikum.

Saya ada beberapa aduan. Saya sudah pm di FB namun tiada feedback jadi saya post di sini.

Saya dan anak saya hadir 2 kali setiap seorang kerana conjunctivitis iaitu kali pertama dan 3 hari selepas lawatan pertama iaitu pada Sabtu lalu.

1. Doktor tidak menasihati/memberi pesanan kepada pesakit untuk berhenti menggunakan ubat sekiranya simptom semakin teruk. Sebagai pesakit yg 'taat' dan bukan dalam bidang perubatan, kami hanya menurut sahaja.
2. Setelah 3 hari tanpa penambahbaikan malah mata semakin bengkak, kami diberi ubat lain dan semasa rawatan saya, salah seorang doktor menggunakan ayat 'perlu try and error' apabila saya memaklumkan ubat sebelum ini menyebabkan mata semakin merah (tetapi saya terus menggunakannya selama 3 hari seperti diarahkan kerana menyangka ianya simptom biasa). Bagi saya, mata adalah organ sensitif dan perlu diberi preskripsi yang betul bukannya 'try and error'. Situasi ini sedikit sebanyak menimbulkan panik apa lagi ianya melibatkan organ mata yg tiada ganti. Seharusnya doktor lebih mahir untuk memberi rawatan yg tepat sama ada ianya berkaitan virus, bakteria atau allergy. 3 punca ini tidak diterangkan oleh doktor tetapi hanya disebut apabila ditanya (kerana saya membuat pembacaan di internet).
3. Saya hadir kerana mata merah dan kejadian dan unsur allergy sudah dimaklumkan tetapi memandangkan anak sedang kuarantin conjunctivitis, kami juga tidak pasti sama ada ianya disebabkan jangkitan atau allergy. Namun, apa yg mengecewakan, seolah2 faktor allergy ditolak pada kedua2 lawatan saya ke klinik (memandangkan anak dikuarantin kerana conjunctivitis) Namun, atas kepercayaan kepada para doktor yang lebih pakar, saya menurut sahaja. Akibatnya, ubat yang diberi menyebabkan mata saya yang pada asalnya tidak teruk menjadi sangat merah, malah kesan yg tidak dirasai sebelum ini iaitu tekanan dalam mata, mata terasa berpasir, terasa seolah2 ada sesuatu di dalam mata tiba2 menjadi teruk. Sekali lagi, kami tidak dipesan untuk berhenti sekiranya simptom menjadi semakin teruk. Tetapi kami bertuah kerana telah dinasihati doktor dari klinik lain sepatutnya apabila simptom semakin teruk walaupun sedikit, perlu berhenti serta merta. Maka atas sebab itu, kami membuat panggilan ke klinik utk mendapatkan kepastian sama ada untuk meneruskan atau memberhentikan ubatan. Kesemua doktor yang kami berurusan semasa lawatan, tidak ada seorang pun yg memberi pesanan tersebut.
4. Antibiotik ditulis 3-5 hari. Tetapi apabila ditambah antibiotik lain, saya bertanya jika antibiotik lama perlu dihentikan atau ditambah bagi mencukupkan 5 hari. Tetapi doktor memaklumkan untuk ditambah sebanyak 5 hari (sefaham saya melalui penerangan doktor) dan perlu habis bersama antibiotik baharu, yg menjadikan tempoh antibiotik digunakan selama 8 hari.
5. Saya dan anak-anak diberi antibiotik jenis titisan mata. Kami tidak dipesan untuk menyimpan ubatan tersebut di dalam peti sejuk. Pada lawatan kedua, kami baru menyedari nota kecil pada ubat (namun ditekankan seharusnya aspek penting seperti itu ditekankan oleh ahli farmasi dan doktor), namun apa yg lebih mengecewakan, di nota ditulis refrigerate, tetapi apabila kami merujuk kembali, staff/ahli farmasi memaklumkan tak apa jika tidak disimpan di dalam peti. Jadi ubat titisan yang dimasukkan ke dalam mata saya dan anak-anak sebenarnya berpotensi rosak kerana tidak disimpan dengan betul!
6. Hasil lawatan ke klinik lain, kami diberi semula antibititik sama yg telah dibayar (tetapi rosak krn cara simpanan salah) krn dikhuatiri ianya tidak berkesan dan diberi ubat anti radang kerana mata ank bengkak selama hampir 2 minggu. Setelah itu baharulah kembali pulih.

Pada pandangan saya, doktor perlu maklum bahawa kami pesakit kebanyakannya bukanlah dari bidang perubatan dan sekecil kecil penerangan tidak seharusnya dipandang ringan. Maaf dan terima kasih.

review_text:
Saya sangat berpuas hati dengan servis di Klinik Utama Cyberjaya 24 Jam ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Pengalaman dengan Dr Fariz memang terbaik. Dr sangat berbudi bahasa, tenang, dan profesional sepanjang rawatan. Penerangan yang diberikan sangat jelas dan mudah faham, terutamanya ketika saya bawa bayi untuk ambil vaksin dan buat pemeriksaan ujian darah.

Staff klinik juga mesra dan membantu, servis cepat walaupun datang waktu agak sibuk.
Memang highly recommended untuk sesiapa yang cari klinik 24 jam dengan servis berkualiti 👍

review_text:
I recently had the pleasure of visiting Poliklinik Cahaya Medik due to discomfort in my feet. During my initial consultation, I had the pleasure of meeting Dr. Vasuki, who exuded warmth and professionalism. From the onset of our discussion regarding my condition, I felt reassured that I was in capable hands. Dr. Vasuki accurately diagnosed my ailment, provided sound advice, and cared for me with the utmost compassion, akin to a cherished family member. 😊

During my subsequent visit, I had the privilege of consulting with Dr. Vigneis, who impressed me with his amiable demeanor and profound insights. He offered valuable tips and demonstrated an exceptional ability to empathize with patients, understanding their perspectives with ease. 🌟

Additionally, I must commend Poliklinik Cahaya Medik for their reasonable pricing. For instance, I was pleasantly surprised to only pay RM 25 for a blood test, without the inconvenience of navigating through hospitals or laboratories. 💰

Without a doubt, if I or my loved ones require medical attention in the future, I will not hesitate to return to Poliklinik Cahaya Medik. Their team's genuine friendliness and unwavering dedication to patient care truly set them apart.❤❤

review_text: "First time visiting this clinic, and gotta say, Dr. Vasuki was awesome and she has a motherly healing touch! She was super friendly and really listened to me. She did a thorough check-up and figured out what was wrong. The meds she gave me really helped with my chest congestion from GERD. Thanks so much, doc! I'll definitely be back."

review_text: Very friendly doctors and staffs. Great location and easy to find parking. If you are scared of blood taking, go and see Dr Vigneis. Me and my husband went for regular check up and blood test with Dr Vigneis. I always had difficulties in blood drawing and other doctor would normally use butterfly needle on me, most of the time they will inject me 2 times to find my veins. But Dr Vigneis took good care of it he did the blood taking very well i didnt feel any pain and no bruises at all. We had the test on Saturday and got our result on Monday morning, very efficient. He also continue to follow up with us personally regarding the test result and advise us the things/food should be avoided to maintain our health condition. Highly recommended. review_text:
This is my second visit to this clinic. On both occasions, I was genuinely unwell. During my recent visit, I came to request an MC only, as I still had the medicines from my previous visit two weeks ago.

However, when I explained that I was not well enough to go to work and needed an MC, the doctor asked “awak kerap ambil MC ke?” This question left me quite speechless, as it made me feel as though I frequently take MC without valid reasons, which is not the case.

I hope such misunderstandings can be avoided in the future, as patients who come in unwell should not feel judged when seeking medical leave.

review_text:
My husband visited because he had the tingling and numbing sensation on his left leg for a few days and end up starting to have blister. We were worried that rather than the blister itself, the numbing feeling was strong and it related to the nerve system so we shared the concern and asked is it shingles but the doctor said with his 6 years of experience he CAN'T diagnose it as shingles at all. Also we have scolded that we think we are the doctor by using AI which we didn't even use😅

But the next day, the blister got really bad and at the end he got blisters all around his left leg. Luckily another clinic helped with prescribing the antiviral medicine but we have been told it wouldn't get that bad if it was diagnosed properly at the first visit. Shingles needs to be identified within 72 hours to prevent the worse case so anybody who suspect to have shingles I don't really recommend this clinic.

place_address: 22G, Lingkaran Cyber Point Barat, Cyberjaya, 63000 Cyberjaya, Selangor
review_text:
Brought my friend in with active vomiting and a pulse rate of 123. After being seen by Dr Syafiq, IV drip treatment was planned, but the entire procedure was carried out by a clinic assistant/nurse without any doctor supervision.

There were multiple issues with the drip, and when asked, the clinic assistant claimed the doctor is not in the clinic, which I found very unprofessional and an unsafe practice given the patient’s condition and even when patient became restless. When I later tried to clarify the matter directly with the doctor, there was no accountability.

Overall, the care felt poorly managed and raised concerns about patient safety. I hope the management will take this seriously and prioritise proper medical supervision and patient care.

review_text: We came here to meet the doctor for quarterly check-up. The receptionist was nice, the doctor was kind & polite, the pharmacist was good too. Once we were there, more and more patients came in. May God heals us all, amin ya rabbal alamin. Fully recommendable!

review_text: The clinic declared of having 23 hours operation. There is even a big 23 hours sign in front of the clinic, along in the mymedic app. I reached the clinic at 11.50pm on the 24/01/25. She told me they close at 12am, while it was 11.50pm and there is a patient in pain. I've been to the clinic a number of times, the doctors there were nice, but the staffs weren't.

Yesterday I went to the klinik because I have hard cough , the Dr see me and give me Antibiotic
The bill was 75 RM with consultation
I took one tablet only and after one hour all my body has allergic from this medication
When I come back again to the klinik , I asked to see the Dr again , they told me that she has left to her home
Another Dr see me and change all the medications
Then they give me another bill 90 RM !!!!!!
I asked them why !!??? You shouldn’t take another consultation from me they said that because it is another Dr !!!! Yes but you are in same klinik and the klinik should solve this problem and pay not me and also it’s not my fault !!!!you give me wrong medication !!! Rude staff? After entertaining all sorts of patients attitude. If you feel docs aren't qualified here, log a case with MMC WITH proof better.

review_text: I'm really happy with my visit to Klinik Dr Ko Cyberjaya! Dr Annie Sia provided excellent care from start to finish—thorough, knowledgeable, and genuinely caring. The entire staff was warm, welcoming, and made me feel comfortable throughout the process. Best of all, I could see noticeable improvements in my skin after the treatment. Highly recommend this clinic to anyone looking for professional skincare solutions. Thank you, Dr Annie and the amazing team!

place_address: Unit 4812-0-52, Blok, Klinik Dr Ko Cyberjaya, 4812, Jln Perdana, CBD Perdana 2, 63000 Cyberjaya, Selangor
review_text:
I was informed by an ex-colleague in Shell that Dr Ko has a branch in Cyberjaya, thus I don't have to wait for weekend at Subang Jaya to do my treatment. I booked an appointment around two days before it and when the day came, I drove and parked at the designated parking slot in front of the clinic.

The clinic was well-lit, fresh-looking with no strong fragrant, which I truly love. Miss Nicole assisted me during registration, then Dr Annie did the consultation. After all the consultation and FAQ session done, I waited at the front for a while. After around five minutes, Miss Nicole called me to enter room 1.

My treatment procedure went exceptionally well. I would be coming again in few weeks for a follow-up and we would take it from there. Strongly recommended! Thank you so much, Dr Annie and all the ladies!

place_address: Unit 4812-0-52, Blok, Klinik Dr Ko Cyberjaya, 4812, Jln Perdana, CBD Perdana 2, 63000 Cyberjaya, Selangor
review_text: I had a great experience at Klinik Dr Ko Cyberjaya. Dr. Annie was very professional and friendly—she explained my skin condition in detail using simple and understandable language, which really helped me feel more confident about the treatment. I’ve seen a lot of improvement in my skin since starting here. Although the clinic was quite busy with many patients, my waiting time was only around 10 minutes, which shows their excellent time management. Highly recommended!

place_address: Unit 4812-0-52, Blok, Klinik Dr Ko Cyberjaya, 4812, Jln Perdana, CBD Perdana 2, 63000 Cyberjaya, Selangor
review_text: Truly satisfied with my experience under Dr Annie Sia. Professional service, friendly staff, and visible improvement in my skin. Thank you to the team at Dr Ko Cyberjaya.

review_text: I went there for a skin problem. Overall, the procedure was quite transparent. The receptionist mentioned upfront that a consultation fee of around RM50–80 applies. Dr. Annie is very detailed and professional, and the staff are attentive and helpful. I had facial and laser treatments, and I will definitely follow up again after one month.

place_address: Unit 4812-0-52, Blok, Klinik Dr Ko Cyberjaya, 4812, Jln Perdana, CBD Perdana 2, 63000 Cyberjaya, Selangor
review_text:
If you plan to claim insurance for your visit here, I strongly advise you NOT to come here.

I had a very poor administrative experience. The doctor was okay and friendly, but the front desk staff clearly did not know what they were doing. I requested a revised itemised receipt for insurance purposes and had to follow up multiple times because every version came back incomplete. In the end, I even had to return to the clinic physically just to resolve what should have been a simple documentation issue.

This level of incompetence is deeply concerning. Front desk staff represent the clinic, and when they are poorly trained, it directly affects patient experience and trust.

I will not return, and I would not recommend this clinic to anyone who needs proper administrative support, especially for insurance claims.

place_address: Unit 4812-0-52, Blok, Klinik Dr Ko Cyberjaya, 4812, Jln Perdana, CBD Perdana 2, 63000 Cyberjaya, Selangor
review_text: Brought my 2 months old daughter here because she has a quite severe case of atopic dermatitis where most clinics wouldnt be able to solve. Dr Chester was so helpful as to provide the right medication and treatment for her. Within 2 weeks, my daughter's skin heals back to its former glory (flawless). Thank you so much to Dr Chester and the fellow nurses for all of your amazing help.

place_address: Unit 4812-0-52, Blok, Klinik Dr Ko Cyberjaya, 4812, Jln Perdana, CBD Perdana 2, 63000 Cyberjaya, Selangor
review_text:
I would like to share my experience of undergoing pigmentation and facial treatment at the Dr.KO Clinic, Cyberjaya. It was very good, comfortable and as a result, my facial skin looked brighter, radiant, pigmentation was fading, and wrinkles on my face were also less visible.
Doc Annie is the doc who was in charge of the entire laser treatment. She is a very experienced, gentle and thorough doctor when treating the pigmentation on my face. Throughout the entire laser treatment, I felt comfortable and calm. The results were amazing because the pigmentation faded, my facial skin became brighter and more radiant.
Nicole was the therapist who was on duty for my facial. Throughout the entire facial, Nicole was very kind, expert ,friendly and gentle, making me feel very comfortable and relaxed.
Ivy, the branch manager, she is also very nice, always smiling, good communication skills and easy to deal with in any matter. The same goes for Farah and Sophie. They always smile and greet me every time I step into Dr.KO Clinic. That makes me feel comfortable and happy to undergo pigmentation and facial treatments at Dr.KO Clinic, Cyberjaya branch.

place_address: A-G-02 Block A Jalan Teknokrat 6 Cybersquare, Cyber 5, 63000 Cyberjaya, Selangor
review_text:
This is not just a review. This is my heartfelt gratitude, poured out with tears, to Klinik Familink and especially to Dr Dev.

I came into the clinic in one of the most difficult moments of my life. My health condition had left me feeling weak, frightened, and ashamed. I was carrying so much fear inside me that even walking through the clinic doors felt heavy. I was terrified of being judged, terrified of being dismissed, terrified of walking out feeling even more broken than when I walked in.

But then I met Dr Dev.

The way he looked at me, the way he listened, the way he spoke, it was as if all the walls I had built inside me to protect myself slowly began to fall. He was not just a doctor to me in that moment, he was a safe place. He did not see me as a case or a condition. He saw me as a person. A human being who was hurting, who was scared, who just needed someone to care without judgment.

I cannot explain fully how healing his empathy was. His voice was gentle yet strong, his words were full of compassion, and his presence carried a calmness that reached deep into my heart. For the first time in a long time, I felt understood. I felt respected. I felt that my fears and my pain were valid, and that I did not have to carry them alone.

I cried inside that room, but those tears were not from fear anymore. They were tears of relief. Tears of finally feeling safe. Tears of being treated with kindness and dignity when I had braced myself for shame and rejection.

Dr Dev, if you ever read this, please know that you have given me more than medical care. You gave me comfort. You gave me hope. You gave me back the strength to face tomorrow. In the middle of my storm, you were the calm. In my darkness, you were the light.

To anyone who is reading this and is afraid of seeking help, please trust me when I say this: Klinik Familink is not just a clinic, it is a place where humanity still exists. And if you are fortunate enough to meet Dr Dev, you will know what it means to be cared for not just as a patient, but as a person with a heart, fears, and dignity that deserve to be honored.

Thank you, Dr Dev. From the bottom of my heart, thank you. You will never know how much your kindness has meant to me, but I will carry it with me always.

review_text:
My experience at this clinic was good but I had to give 1 star because I was misdiagnosed. I came last month in the morning due to very bad stomach pain to the point where it hurts for me to breathe deep.

The kind doctor advised me to do an ultrasound, but he couldn’t see anything wrong. Then we proceeded with a urine test. He said all ok, lastly we did a blood test but still the young Dr couldn’t rule out a cause. So he advised me to see a gynaecologist if pain worsens. He prescribed me with medications of all sorts because he didn’t know what was wrong but I was in agonising pain.

I didn’t even get an MC so I went to work but around evening the pain was so bad I immediately go to the hospital. The doctors at the hospital told me it was appendicitis but it was super swollen so it’s almost impossible to miss and they even wondered how I was misdiagnosed on the SAME DAY. I ended up having to go for surgery immediately.

The Dr at this clinic did mention appendicitis but he said that is not my case according to my blood test. However on the same day my blood test at the hospital detected HIGH levels of infection whereas that morning I was told by this Dr that my blood test came out normal.

I’m not sure if the Dr lacks experience or it could be a malfunction of the machines hence the inaccuracy of results. My total bill was ~RM150 eventhough no diagnosis was made.

The good side is that all staffs were helpful and friendly. Clinic was very clean and comfortable too. But I hope they would look into this so the same mistakes wouldn’t be repeated.

review_text:
I rarely leave reviews, but this experience was honestly too disappointing to ignore.

The receptionist’s attitude was extremely rude and unprofessional. From the moment I walked in, I felt like I was being judged and unwelcome. There was no basic courtesy. No greeting, no smile, not even a polite tone. It felt like she had no interest in doing her job or assisting patients at all.

What made it worse was when I asked about panel coverage. Instead of explaining properly, she responded in a very dismissive and reluctant manner, as if my questions were a burden. As a patient who came in feeling unwell, this kind of treatment was very upsetting and stressful.

Front desk staff represent the entire clinic. If the first interaction is already this unpleasant, it really affects the overall trust and comfort level of patients. Healthcare is not just about treatment—it’s also about empathy, respect, and basic human decency.

I am genuinely disappointed and hope the management will take this seriously. No patient deserves to be treated this way, especially when they are already not feeling well.

review_text: Very bad customer service. Wanted to see doctor because of fever & diarrhea. Went inside and spoke to the staff at the counter if i can park my car at the designated parking area, the staff asked “kenapa nak jumpa doc?”. I told her regarding my condition and staff replied “kena pusing cari parking, pusing kat belakang ni, depan ni tak boleh park”. I went to park my car and the moment i entered the clinic, the staff baru nak ckp “Puan sini kita fertility clinic, demam, diarrhea kita tak terima, tak de ubat utk yg tu”. Yg td masa org ckp elok2, menjawab persoalan dia yg agak berlagak “kenapa nak jumpa doc?”, telinga awk kat mana dik? You even asked me to pusing cari parking, takkan awk tak tahu clinic awk kerja provide service apa? Then i asked her boleh ke register or sy boleh balik je, she said i can register. Register hanya utk tunggu doc keluar just to inform me that clinic hanya utk fertility and focus on gynae tx. Lahhhh tp kat website list of services the top 2 for general health. If you guys tukar scope of service or tx, at least the front counter must get it right, do the right things. And most important thing is ethics u berckp dgn patients/customers sbb you front counter. Perhaps you guys boleh berlajar dr clinic lqin especially Hazra Medic Cyberjaya, dr front counter sampai complete tx, semua professional.

place_name: Klinik Pergigian The Tamarin Dental Co. Cyberjaya
place_address: C-01-07 Tamarind Square, Persiaran Multimedia, 63000 Cyberjaya, Selangor
review_text:
I am so happy. This will be my second home.

The place, the people, the treatment, the experience, everything is just spot on. I have never been any happier in my life as compared to after getting my 3-6 molar extracted here.

Losing your teeth. The feel of that loss, like losing the non-married love of your life, is definitely painful and emotionally drowning. It keeps me up at night, and fills me with regrets of choices i made everyday. But after seeing the dentist here (i didnt get her name), i feel like i have been revived, back into this life.

Despite the loss i have been through, she breathe life back into me. With her calming voice and strong hands pulling out my teeth, i finally feel like there is so much more to life than me depressing over the loss of my previous love life.

Thank you doctor. Thank you very much. U have made me a believer in love, again. Now i will venture into the real world, one less teeth-pain, to find my true love.

Aside from all this. Service is exemplary. Place is super nice. I will definitely come back here to address my dental needs. Recommended!

review_text:
I recently brought my dad to Klinik Pergigian The Tamarin Dental Co. Cyberjaya and was very disappointed with the experience.
The dental assistants were quite rude and lacked basic communication skills. They did not keep me informed about what was happening during the procedure, which caused unnecessary anxiety. The dentist didn't even consult weather what the procedure she want to do and my dad old you need to consider other consequences before taking a decision.

Clear communication is essential in any healthcare setting, especially in dentistry, where patients (and their next of kin) deserve to be kept informed about treatments and procedures. Unfortunately, this level of care was missing during our visit.

I hope the clinic addresses these concerns and improves staff training on patient communication and professionalism. Until then, I would be hesitant to return or recommend their services.
